message:
test(proptest): add 16 property tests for scrollback_tiers module

Covers: ScrollbackConfig/Tier/TierSnapshot serde roundtrips, hot tier
bounding, total line count consistency, tail length bounds, tier offset
classification, snapshot-accessor parity, clear/evict invariants,
compression ratio positivity, and live snapshot serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
